sglang.title: fix: accept 0-indexed safetensors shard names in CI weight validator
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
_validate_sharded_model in python/sglang/srt/model_loader/ci_weight_validation.py hardcodes the expected shard-id set as set(range(1, total_shards + 1)). This works for 1-indexed releases (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3) but produces a false positive for 0-indexed releases.
Concrete example se

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Move ModelOpt checkpoints to lmsys
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Move existing SGLang diffusion ModelOpt checkpoint references from personal BBuf/* Hugging Face repos to clean lmsys/* org repos.

update diffusion quantization docs and the docs-new mirror
update the ModelOpt diffusion quant skill default references
update B200 ModelOpt CI constants in test

sglang.title: Encode routed_experts in the detokenizer, off the tokenizer hot path
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Move the per-request base64 encoding of routed_experts from TokenizerManager into DetokenizerManager. The tokenizer hot path now passes the encoded string straight through; the encode work runs in the detokenizer process where it doesn't compete with the response/streaming path.
TokenizerManager kee

sglang.title: [NPU] Add GitHub test summary and deduplicate test code. Part 1
sglang.author: e-martirosian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It is necessary to add a GitHub summary to present test data and results in a more readable format. Also, the test code needs to be cleaned up — specifically, duplicates should be removed.

Modifications

Added summary for tests (gsm8k and mmmu)
Remove code duplications


Result

Checklis

sglang.title: [NPU]TP Communications compression For Qwen3 models for NPU
sglang.author: egvenediktov
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Implemented INT8 TP communications compression on prefill for Qwen3 models.
Compression achieves average 5% performance improvement on prefill intense benchmarks (see Benchmarking and Profiling). Accuracy tests show no degradation on average (BoolQ, C-Eval, HellaSwag; see Accuracy Tests).

sglang.title: Optimize large GroupNorm SiLU apply
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Optimize the large-shape triton_group_norm_silu chunked apply stage used by HunyuanVideo VAE decode.

Add a scalar-affine apply kernel for aligned chunked rows where each program covers a single channel, avoiding per-element idx // spatial_size and vector affine loads.
Keep the existing gene

sglang.title: [codex] diffusion: enable group norm silu fuse by default
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Follow-up to #22814. This makes the CUDA GroupNorm+SiLU VAE fast path the default instead of requiring an environment variable.
Changes are intentionally narrow:

remove the SGLANG_USE_CUDA_HUNYUANVIDEO_GROUP_NORM_SILU gate
add a small apply_group_norm_silu helper with safe fallbacks for CPU

Add /v1/loads and /model_info to the model gateway as the canonical paths, matching the latest sglang server. Keep /get_loads and /get_model_info as deprecated aliases (mirroring the existing /server_info / /get_server_info pattern).
Update the HTTP and PD upstream proxies to call /model_in

sglang.title: [CI] drop --prerelease allow from uv pip install suffix
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Drop --prerelease allow from PIP_INSTALL_SUFFIX in scripts/ci/cuda/ci_install_dependency.sh so uv prefers stable releases on every fleet. Pure CI hygiene — no functional fix.

This PR was originally opened as a fix for a FileNotFoundError: '/root/.cache/tvm-ffi/sgl_ke

sglang.title: [Feature] add LoRADrainer to address high P99 TTFT
sglang.author: glenliu21
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, our LoRA implementation suffers from an extremely high P99 TTFT issue. For instance, running with the below scripts on an A100-SXM4-80GB:
python3 -m sglang.launch_server \
    --model-path meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct \
    --max-loaded-loras 6 \
    --max-loras-per-batch 3

sglang.title: Fix disagg decode SWA prealloc sizing
sglang.author: weireweire
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

allocate decode prefill full KV for the full prompt while sizing SWA KV only for the active sliding-window tail
add split full/SWA prealloc budget accounting and wait reasons to decode batch logging
expose SWA pool availability helpers for decode admission checks

Tests

python3 -m py_compi

sglang.title: [CI] Fix nightly NV jobs cancelling each other via shared concurrency groups
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Each per-job concurrency.group in nightly-test-nvidia.yml (nightly-hw-{h100,h200,h20,b200}) was shared across many jobs. GitHub Actions only keeps one pending job per concurrency group: when a second job tries to queue while one is already pending, the previously pending one is cancelled — r

sglang.title: [CI] Keep custom sgl-kernel wheel in CUDA CI
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes a regression from #21247 where CUDA CI always force-reinstalled sglang-kernel from the public wheel index, which could overwrite a freshly built PR sgl-kernel wheel when CUSTOM_BUILD_SGL_KERNEL=true.
Keep the custom-built wheel in that path so CI actually tests kernel changes from the

sglang.title: [CI] [release/v0.5.11] Fix nightly NV jobs cancelling each other via shared concurrency groups
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Cherry-pick of #24282 (commit 266d994) onto release/v0.5.11.
Removes the shared concurrency groups that caused nightly NV jobs to cancel each other.
Test plan

 Verify nightly NV workflow no longer cancels concurrent runs on the release branch

sglang.title: Rename SGLANG_USE_JIT_ALL_REDUCE to SGLANG_OPT_USE_CUSTOM_ALL_REDUCE_V2
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Rename the JIT all-reduce opt-in env var and migrate to the envs module for consistency with other recent allreduce flags.

vllm.title: [Build] Switch CUDA 13.0 wheel builds to PyTorch manylinux_2_28 base
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Lowers the glibc floor of the published CUDA 13.0 wheels from 2.34 (Ubuntu 22.04) to 2.28 (AlmaLinux 8 via pytorch/manylinux2_28-builder:cuda13.0), matching what PyTorch ships and restoring compatibility with older OSes (RHEL 8, Ubuntu 20.04, etc.).
Context: see slack discussion and #26118.

vllm.title: Revert "[Build] Make bundled DeepGEMM wheel portable across Python versions"
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Reverts #41476 as the approach is not actually viable for pybind11-based bindings

vllm.title: [CI] Add ci-fetch-log.sh helper for Buildkite job logs
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

New .buildkite/scripts/ci-fetch-log.sh: downloads a Buildkite job log from the public /organizations/<org>/pipelines/<pipeline>/builds/<n>/jobs/<uuid>/download endpoint, then runs ci-clean-log.sh. The user-facing /<org>/<pipeline>/... URLs return 404 for log routes, which is why the existin

vllm.title: [DSv4] Tune default value of `VLLM_MULTI_STREAM_GEMM_TOKEN_THRESHOLD`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Empirically 1024 is a better default value for turning on multi-stream. In a disgg setting, this env var already disable multi-stream for prefill nodes and enable for decode nodes (since it's rare to have one rank handling > 1024 requests), which is what we intend to have.

This backend supports running DeepSeek-V4.
